metadata.seed: Yes. When I try to pull weeds, it just takes me forever in my garden, and then I have to come in and sit down, and then I just don't understand why I can't do it like I used to, and it's frustrating.

patient.query: Well, when those thoughts come in, I tend to just shut down a bit. I feel this weight in my chest, and sometimes I just want to avoid everything. It's like I can't think straight or focus on anything else. Then I end up feeling even more anxious and guilty for not doing anything.

automatic_thoughts: I can't think straight
I feel guilty for not doing anything

my mind won't let me
